name: PAY_RATE_CONTRIBUTORS_F
description: This table contains the rate contributor information. A rate contributor is a value that contributes to a rate definition.

columns.Name: RATE_CONTRIBUTOR_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for the Rate Contributor

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: RATE_DEFINITION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the Rate Definition

columns.Name: BALANCE_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to the Ba;ance Type. This indicates the contributor to the Rate

columns.Name: CONTRIBUTOR_MODE
columns.Comments: The Mode in which the contribution takes place. Declared, Actual or Projected.

columns.Name: CONTRIBUTOR_TYPE
columns.Comments: What Type of contributor the Value is, is it another Rate Definition

columns.Name: CONTRIBUTOR_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to the Contributor

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the Rate Contributor

columns.Name: FEED
columns.Comments: Is it a positive or negative contribution.

columns.Name: AS_OF_DATE
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to Time Definitions.

columns.Name: AS_OF_DATE_BALANCE
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to Time Definitions

columns.Name: BALANCE_DIMENSION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to Balance Dimensions

columns.Name: PERIODICITY
columns.Comments: Periodicity to be used for the calculation

columns.Name: FACTOR_TYPE
columns.Comments: The Type of Factor that is to be used

columns.Name: FACTOR_VALUE
columns.Comments: The Value of the Factor to be used

columns.Name: FACTOR_INVERSE
columns.Comments: Inverse the factor for calculation.

columns.Name: FACTOR_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: For Factor Type VBC this attribute can be used to identify the leaf node value.

columns.Name: LIMIT_MODE
columns.Comments: Behavior when the Amount is outside the minimum limits.

columns.Name: MAX_LIMIT_MODE
columns.Comments: Behavior when the Amount is outside the maximum limits.

columns.Name: MIN_TYPE
columns.Comments: The Type of Minimum value to use

columns.Name: MIN_VALUE
columns.Comments: The Value of the Minimum value based on the Type.

columns.Name: MIN_VALUE_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: For MIN_TYPE of VBC this attribute Identifies the leaf node for the value.

columns.Name: MAX_TYPE
columns.Comments: The Type of Maximum Value to be used.

columns.Name: MAX_VALUE
columns.Comments: The Value of the Maximum value based on the Type.

columns.Name: MAX_VALUE_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: For Max_TYPE of VBC this attribute identifies the leaf node of the value to use.

columns.Name: FTE_FLAG
columns.Comments: This indicates whether the amount to add to the Rate should be FTE

columns.Name: USE_FORMULA
columns.Comments: This indicates whether the Rate formula on the Input Value is used to calculate the value.

columns.Name: DIVISIONAL_BAL_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: THe Balance Type to be used to perform a divide on the Rate.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to the Enterprise table

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to the Legislative Data Group

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: The Legislation Code for this data.

columns.Name: SEQUENCE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Sequence of the Rate Contributor

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
